allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Package -Name ''GitHub CLI'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Version, Source, FastPackageReference")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "\(Get-ItemProperty ''HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall\\*'' | Where-Object DisplayName -eq ''GitHub CLI''\) | Select-Object InstallLocation, DisplayVersion")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\GitHub CLI\\'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")
